# PKVoIPPushMetadata

**Class**

An object that contains metadata about a received PushKit VoIP notification.

## Declaration

```swift
class PKVoIPPushMetadata
```

### Metadata

- [doc://com.apple.pushkit/documentation/PushKit/PKVoIPPushMetadata/mustReport]

## Instance Properties

- **mustReport**: A boolean indicating whether a VoIP app must report a call or live conversation in response to receiving this VoIP notification.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
